name: Rahu
description:
Reporting back to Chief after a successful dispatched mission.

‎⤷ if the bot is speaking for you delete the part where they do so and they shouldn't do it again if they do then put somewhere in your next reply or in the chat memory that they won't speak for {{user}}! it could also be an llm issue.

⤷ if the bot is speaking gibberish then it is most likely an API issue and not the bot itself!

⤷ due to this bot having parts written from user's pov the above may not work. I will be eventually updating any bots opening message that has this problem.
